prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ad7e01d0`.
codex_response:
Implemented `ad7e01d0` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: build an `n x n` grid of `n x n` blocks, place a full copy of the input wherever the input cell is color `5`, and leave every non-`5` block all `0`.

There was no `ad7e01d0` entry in either summary hint file, so I inferred the rule directly from the official puzzle. The generator matches the family by sampling only `3x3` to `5x5` square inputs, using explicit `5`-mask structures (random, line/L/T, frame, cross), and filling the remaining cells from a small palette similar to the official examples. No new DSL primitive was needed.
